name: Eclipse Shade
tips: The best stat-per-mana body in the game: 20/26 for 1 mana. The catch is self-burn — she takes 5 🤍 at the start of every one of your turns until she dies.
Roughly five turns to use her or lose her. Play her down a lane she can actually push or attack in, not a holding position.
Perfect Feed the Shadow fodder: 1-mana summon + 2-mana Feed = 20 damage for 3 mana.
Pair with Dark Matter Stash to buff her stats before burn eats her HP. Each DM-fueled +🗡️/+🤍 extends her clock.
Against a Flame Wyrm on the opposing board, her self-burn ticks for 6/turn instead of 5 — her clock drops by a full turn.
rulings: Self-burn fires on Summon, so she enters play already burning. The first tick lands at the start of your next turn.
Burn is a boolean status — re-applying Burn to an already-burning minion does nothing extra.
If burn kills her, any Death triggers on her (none by default) fire normally.
A Flame Wyrm controlled by YOUR opponent adds +1 to her burn tick. Your own Flame Wyrm does not — it buffs burns on enemy minions only.
